US County Population Atlas

Drag the handles below to pick a year span. Every county recolors by its percent population change across that span — Census Bureau intercensal estimates, 2000–2025.

Source: US Census Bureau Population Estimates Program (county-level intercensal estimates, vintages 2025, 2020, and 2010). Connecticut's eight historical counties were replaced by nine planning regions in 2022, so spans that end after 2019 can't compute a comparable figure for Connecticut and show as no-data. Alaska's Chugach and Copper River Census Areas are mapped using their former combined Valdez–Cordova boundary, which the Census Bureau split in 2019.
